name: armature
description: Bootstrap and maintain a Claude Code documentation/workflow environment — CLAUDE.md, ADR↔plan↔backlog, coding standards — in any project. Commands are namespaced under /armature:.

lang.title: Content language
lang.description: Language of the docs Armature generates (e.g. "en", "fr"). Must match a subdirectory of the bundled templates/. Left empty, the bootstrap skill asks.
